name: Satellite (offline prototype)
//: MapLibre style JSON. This replaces Google's MapType.SATELLITE enum.
//sources: A single raster source = the satellite imagery tiles. THIS url is what the offline pack downloads and caches on-device.

satellite.//: PROTOTYPE tile source: Esri World Imagery. Free for evaluation but has usage terms — see PROTOTYPE_README.md before shipping. Swap this URL for a licensed provider (Mapbox raster, MapTiler, Bing, or your own tile server) for production.
satellite.attribution: Imagery: Esri, Maxar, Earthstar Geographics, and the GIS User Community
